hero.title: Outbound trades the markets while you sleep.
hero.subtitle: An automated stock trading bot targeting 2–3% monthly net returns on Alpaca Markets — with every fee tracked, so the number you see is the number you keep.

features.title: Built like institutional infrastructure.
features.subtitle: Edge isn't magic — it's small advantages, compounded daily and protected by ruthless risk controls.

execution.title: Low-latency execution
execution.description: Orders routed through Alpaca with millisecond-level signal-to-fill — written in Go for predictable performance.

risk.title: Risk-first by default
risk.description: Every signal passes a position sizing, drawdown, and exposure check before a single share is bought.

fees.title: True net P&L
fees.description: Wise FX, SEC/FINRA/TAF fees, and wire transfers are all tracked — so you see your real take-home, not gross numbers.

transparency.title: Full trade visibility
transparency.description: Every fill, every signal, every fee — logged, timestamped (Asia/Bangkok and America/New_York), auditable forever.

realtime.title: Realtime dashboard
realtime.description: Portfolio value, open positions and P&L stream live via Supabase — no refresh required.

control.title: You're always in control
control.description: Pause, resume, or hit emergency liquidation from any device. The bot serves your strategy, not the other way around.

reliability.title: Reliability you can verify.
reliability.subtitle: Trust starts with numbers, transparency, and the freedom to walk away.

signal.title: 1. Signal generated
signal.description: Strategy engine evaluates market data on a defined cadence and emits a candidate signal.

risk.title: 2. Risk check
risk.description: Position sizing, exposure limits and drawdown guards run before the order ever leaves our servers.

execute.title: 3. Execute on Alpaca
execute.description: Order is placed via Alpaca, the fill is recorded with all fees attributed to the trade in Supabase.

transparency.title: Every fee, accounted for
transparency.description: Most trading platforms quote returns in gross terms. We don't. The bot logs every cost so the dashboard shows your true net profit.

items.wise: Wise FX conversion fees on every funding leg
items.regulatory: Alpaca regulatory fees (SEC, FINRA, TAF) per fill
items.wire: Wire transfer costs in and out of the broker

stack.title: Built on infrastructure you already trust

q1.question: Is my money held by Outbound?
q1.answer: No. Funds live in your own Alpaca brokerage account. Outbound only places orders on your behalf via the Alpaca API.

q2.question: What returns should I realistically expect?
q2.answer: The bot targets 2–3% net monthly return. Past performance does not guarantee future results — markets can and do produce losing months.

q3.question: Can I stop the bot at any time?
q3.answer: Yes. Pause, resume, or trigger emergency liquidation from the dashboard. You always retain full control of your account.

q4.question: How are fees handled?
q4.answer: Every Wise FX conversion, Alpaca regulatory fee, and wire transfer cost is recorded against the position so the displayed P&L is your true take-home.

cta.title: Ready to put your capital to work?
cta.subtitle: Sign in with Google and start with a paper-trading account in under a minute.

footer.tagline: Automated trading with full fee transparency.
footer.disclaimer: Trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for every investor. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
